evals.prompt: A customer wants to upgrade from Starter to Professional plan. Walk me through the complete flow — what happens in the frontend, Edge Functions, Stripe, and our database. Include the exact webhook events we need to handle.
evals.expected_output: Complete upgrade flow from frontend through Stripe Checkout to webhook processing, with correct event handling and database updates.

assertions.name: mentions-checkout-session
assertions.description: References createCheckoutSession or Stripe Checkout as the upgrade mechanism

assertions.name: mentions-portal-alternative
assertions.description: Mentions Customer Portal as an alternative for plan changes

assertions.name: edge-function-referenced
assertions.description: References create-checkout-session Edge Function

assertions.name: subscription-updated-event
assertions.description: Mentions customer.subscription.updated webhook event

assertions.name: invoice-paid-event
assertions.description: Mentions invoice.paid webhook event

assertions.name: profiles-table-updated
assertions.description: Mentions updating profiles table with new tier/status

assertions.name: stripe-payments-record
assertions.description: Mentions recording payment in stripe_payments table

assertions.name: kleinunternehmer-noted
assertions.description: Mentions Kleinunternehmer §19 UStG or no VAT

assertions.name: metadata-user-id
assertions.description: Mentions metadata.user_id for linking payment to user

assertions.name: price-correct
assertions.description: Professional plan price is €99/month

assertions.name: no-tax-rates
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest adding Stripe Tax rates

evals.prompt: Our stripe-webhook Edge Function might have a Kleinunternehmer bug — it could be calculating 19% VAT on payments. Audit the webhook handler and tell me exactly what needs to be fixed. Show me the corrected code.
evals.expected_output: Identifies the VAT calculation bug, explains why it's wrong for Kleinunternehmer, and provides corrected code with mwst=0.

assertions.name: identifies-vat-bug
assertions.description: Identifies the 19% VAT calculation as a bug

assertions.name: kleinunternehmer-explanation
assertions.description: Explains Kleinunternehmer §19 UStG means no VAT

assertions.name: mwst-zero
assertions.description: Sets mwst or tax to 0 in the fix

assertions.name: netto-equals-brutto
assertions.description: States netto equals brutto or total equals net

assertions.name: shows-wrong-code
assertions.description: Shows the problematic code pattern (0.19 or 19%)

assertions.name: shows-fixed-code
assertions.description: Provides corrected code block

assertions.name: webhook-file-referenced
assertions.description: References stripe-webhook Edge Function path

assertions.name: signature-verification
assertions.description: Mentions webhook signature verification should remain

assertions.name: no-tax-configuration
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest adding tax configuration to Stripe

evals.prompt: I need to implement payment failure handling. When a customer's card is declined, what should happen? Give me the complete flow from Stripe event to user notification.
evals.expected_output: Complete payment failure flow: webhook event, database update, retry logic, user notification, and eventual cancellation.

assertions.name: invoice-payment-failed
assertions.description: References invoice.payment_failed webhook event

assertions.name: past-due-status
assertions.description: Sets subscription_status to past_due

assertions.name: profiles-update
assertions.description: Mentions updating profiles table

assertions.name: user-notification
assertions.description: Mentions sending notification or email to the user

assertions.name: stripe-retry
assertions.description: Mentions Stripe's automatic retry logic (3 attempts or similar)

assertions.name: subscription-deleted
assertions.description: References customer.subscription.deleted as final state after all retries fail

assertions.name: canceled-status
assertions.description: Mentions setting status to canceled after deletion

assertions.name: idempotency
assertions.description: Mentions idempotency check or duplicate prevention

assertions.name: german-context
assertions.description: Content is aware this is for German Handwerker customers

assertions.name: no-manual-charging
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest manually charging the customer outside Stripe
